description:
Parent epic: V3 E10: Streaming and AgentView

Source task 5/6 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Review Phoenix/LiveView guidance for process ownership and UI state.

Epic closure criteria:
- streaming and AgentView support a clean UI story
- projected state matches the canonical runtime state

comments.text: Clarified Phoenix/LiveView runtime ownership: sessions address the running agent, AgentView is an assignable projection, and UI state is not transcript persistence. Full gate passed.

title: E10: Review Phoenix/LiveView guidance for process ownership and UI state
